footer.copy: PortaCivis — Citizen Portal. Rights, duties, services and transparency.

home.title: PortaCivis — Citizen Portal
home.description: Official channel for citizens to learn their rights and duties, access services, and follow city information and transparency.

sections.newsText: Institutional updates and city hall announcements.
sections.transparencyText: Public data, reports and official acts with source references.
sections.accessibilityText: The portal supports high contrast, larger fonts, voice reading, link highlighting and reduced motion.

territory.title: Initial visitor selection
territory.description: View the Brazil map, choose your state and select any city to start the truth trail.
territory.mapAria: Brazil map with federative unit selection
territory.mapDescription: Stylized map with selectable federative unit points

fields.cityManualHint: Automatic city list is unavailable. Type the city manually.

territory.summaryPending: Select state and city to continue.

truthTrail.title: Truth Trail
truthTrail.description: This dedicated route consolidates the visitor's initial context to guide decisions, evidence and institutional communication.
truthTrail.welcomeCity: Welcome to {city} - {uf}. This space is prepared to speed up your access to reliable information and decisions.
truthTrail.welcomeGeneric: Welcome. To improve your experience, confirm your territory and follow the guided paths below.
truthTrail.welcomeGuide: We selected the fastest next steps to reach your intended outcome at this stage.
truthTrail.contextLayers: {count, plural, =0 {No areas selected} =1 {1 consultation area selected} other {# consultation areas selected}}
truthTrail.missingTerritory: No territory was provided. Return to the initial selection to structure the trail.
truthTrail.governance1: Each visit receives unique tracking codes from the start.
truthTrail.governance2: Every interaction is classified to protect your data with clarity.
truthTrail.governance3: Information you provide is kept separate from portal content, making it easier to verify.
truthTrail.governance4: All records are permanent and can be checked at any time.
truthTrail.auditRecorded: Your visit has been securely recorded in a permanent digital record.
truthTrail.auditExists: This visit was already recorded previously.
truthTrail.auditError: Unable to save the record at this time.
truthTrail.auditServerPreferred: Record saved on server with local backup copy.
truthTrail.quickPathsDescription: Choose one route below to move forward faster.

news.label: See official news for your city
news.description: Opens news already filtered by the selected territory.

verify.label: Verify security records
verify.description: Checks that the records in this trail are intact.

agents.label: Explore the agents gallery
agents.description: Shows who structures, reviews and publishes institutional content.

compliance.label: Read compliance and governance
compliance.description: Explains rules, controls and transparency guarantees in place.

restart.label: Redo initial selection
restart.description: Returns to correct state and city before continuing.

agents.title: Porta Civis Agents Gallery
agents.description: These intelligence agents gather, verify and present verified news in a clearer format, with citizen-friendly language, source traceability and compliance review.
agents.how1: They collect and organize information from verifiable official sources.
agents.how2: They check editorial, legal, ethical and accessibility consistency.
agents.how3: They publish content in a clearer format for citizens.

chief_editor_agent.name: Chief Editor Agent
chief_editor_agent.role: Prioritizes agendas, organizes workflow and approves final publication.

news_official_agent.name: Official News Agent
news_official_agent.role: Consolidates official sources and drafts the first version of the news item.

citizen_services_agent.name: Citizen Services Agent
citizen_services_agent.role: Translates technical content into clear and practical public-service language.

transparency_agent.name: Transparency Agent
transparency_agent.role: Validates public data and ensures information traceability.

city_alerts_agent.name: City Alerts Agent
city_alerts_agent.role: Organizes urgent notices with clarity and public priority.

social_distribution_agent.name: Social Distribution Agent
social_distribution_agent.role: Adapts content for distribution channels without losing original meaning.

compliance_lgpd_agent.name: Compliance and LGPD Agent
compliance_lgpd_agent.role: Mitigates legal risks and reviews privacy and institutional integrity.

quality_accessibility_agent.name: Quality and Accessibility Agent
quality_accessibility_agent.role: Ensures readability, inclusion and digital accessibility standards.

newsPage.title: Official News
newsPage.description: Institutional updates, city hall announcements and verified content focused on citizen-friendly language and source traceability.
newsPage.highlightsText: This page brings together official publications in an accessible format. New items will be displayed here according to PortaCivis editorial and compliance workflow.
newsPage.criteria1: Verifiable official source and reference link.
newsPage.criteria2: Clear separation between fact, context and interpretation.

accessibilityPage.title: Accessibility Features
accessibilityPage.description: This portal follows digital accessibility practices to expand access for people with hearing impairment, low vision and other assisted navigation needs.
accessibilityPage.deaf1: Textual content is prioritized for critical notices.
accessibilityPage.deaf2: Editorial recommendation for captions and transcripts in audiovisual content.
accessibilityPage.deaf3: Clear language and topic-based structure for faster reading.
accessibilityPage.lowVision1: High-contrast mode in the accessibility panel.
accessibilityPage.lowVision2: Font size adjustment without layout loss.
accessibilityPage.lowVision3: Voice reading of the page (browser synthesizer).
accessibilityPage.colorBlind1: Simple color-mode selection: default, protanopia, deuteranopia and tritanopia.
accessibilityPage.colorBlind2: Additional link highlighting to reduce exclusive dependence on color.
accessibilityPage.colorBlind3: Combination with high contrast for critical warning readability.
accessibilityPage.mobility2: Shortcut to jump directly to main content.
accessibilityPage.mobility3: Reduced motion to avoid visual discomfort.

compliancePage.title: Compliance and Governance
compliancePage.description: PortaCivis adopts compliance standards to ensure legal security, editorial transparency and respect for fundamental rights.
compliancePage.milestone4: Prevention of undue appropriation and institutional risk.
compliancePage.control3: Verification checklist for national and international decisions.
compliancePage.control4: Digital security standards and continuous verification.
compliancePage.auditVerificationDescription: Check that all Truth Trail records are intact and have not been tampered with.
compliancePage.auditRequestError: Unable to query remote verification at this moment.

privacyPage.title: Privacy and Data Protection Policy (LGPD)
privacyPage.description: PortaCivis processes personal data in a minimal and proportional way, in compliance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (Law No. 13.709/2018), to serve public interest and ensure service security.
privacyPage.data1: Technical navigation data for portal security and integrity.
privacyPage.data2: Strictly necessary access logs for fraud prevention and auditing.
privacyPage.data3: Data voluntarily provided by citizens through official service channels.
privacyPage.purpose2: Ensure platform operation, availability and security.
privacyPage.purpose3: Meet applicable legal and regulatory obligations.
privacyPage.purpose4: Carry out anonymous and aggregated usage research (optional), exclusively to improve digital public services.
privacyPage.limit1: We do not create profiles based on sensitive visitor information.
privacyPage.limit2: We do not attempt to identify who you are from browsing data.
privacyPage.limit3: When we collect usage data, it is anonymous, summarized and verifiable.
privacyPage.right2: Access and correction of data when applicable.
privacyPage.right3: Information about sharing, legal basis and retention.
privacyPage.right4: Request review of automated decisions, when applicable.
privacyPage.contactText: For data and privacy requests, use the official channels published on the municipality institutional service page.

cookiesPage.title: Cookies and Cache Policy
cookiesPage.description: PortaCivis uses cookies and local storage only at the level required for security, accessibility and browsing continuity, with consent controls for anonymous usage research.
cookiesPage.type1: Essential: technical preferences, security and browsing session.
cookiesPage.type2: Accessibility: contrast, font size, reduced motion and reading.
cookiesPage.type3: Anonymous research (optional): aggregated usage metrics, without direct or indirect personal identification.
cookiesPage.limit1: Sensitive profiling by race, religion, health, orientation or ideology is prohibited.
cookiesPage.limit2: Cross-referencing data to re-identify visitors is prohibited.
cookiesPage.limit3: Use of cookies for purposes incompatible with public interest is prohibited.
cookiesPage.legal1: Legal basis: public interest, security and applicable regulatory compliance.
cookiesPage.legal2: Minimization: only data necessary for the declared purpose.
cookiesPage.legal3: Retention: limited and proportional period, with secure disposal.

termsPage.title: PortaCivis Terms of Use
termsPage.description: This portal is an institutional channel for public information disclosure, service guidance and transparency, focused on citizens' rights and duties.
termsPage.general1: Use for lawful purposes and public interest.
termsPage.general2: Use that compromises portal security, integrity or availability is prohibited.
termsPage.general3: Respect for copyrights, trademarks and institutional signs.
termsPage.content1: Official content is published with verifiable source references.
termsPage.content2: Third-party reproduction must preserve attribution and context.
termsPage.content3: Images and media may have specific usage rules.
termsPage.responsibility1: The portal seeks accuracy, timeliness and accessible language.
termsPage.responsibility2: In case of discrepancy, the official act in the primary source prevails.
termsPage.responsibility3: Incidents and outages follow institutional communication protocol.

consent.text: We use only data strictly necessary for portal operation and security. Usage research is always anonymous, optional and without sensitive profiling. Learn more in

provenanceCard.staleWarning: Source {source} has not been updated for {days} days. Last confirmed: {date}.

trailPermalink.title: Trail permalink
trailPermalink.description: Generate a permanent link to share the current state of this trail as evidence.

trailExport.title: Citizen report
trailExport.description: Export a compact report with selected data, sources and timestamp signature.

complianceScore.title: Municipal Compliance Score
complianceScore.description: Compliance assessment based on presence and update status of fiscal and transparency obligations.
complianceScore.historyChart: Score evolution chart for the last 12 months
complianceScore.laiDescription: LAI request template for {city} based on detected non-compliance.

alertsPanel.title: Smart Alerts
alertsPanel.description: Alerts classified by severity with verifiable sources and expiration dates.
alertsPanel.noAlerts: No active alerts in this category.

citizenAgent.title: Citizen Agent

modeDesc.orient: Describe your situation and the agent will map applicable rights and available services in your city.
modeDesc.verify: Paste information or news and the agent will cross-reference with available official sources.
modeDesc.rights: Select a category and see what should exist vs. what is mapped in your city.

citizenAgent.startPrompt: Start the conversation by typing your question or selecting a category above.

inputPlaceholder.verify: Paste the information you want to verify...

citizenAgent.consentLabel: I authorize saving this conversation for later use (LGPD opt-in)
citizenAgent.orientResponse: Based on the context of {city} — {uf}, I identified applicable services and rights for your situation. Check the sources below for more details.
citizenAgent.verifyResponse: I cross-referenced the information with official sources from {city}. IBGE and TCU data were consulted for validation.
citizenAgent.rightsResponse: In the {category} category in {city}, available services were mapped. For items not found in official sources, I recommend contacting the municipal ombudsman.
citizenAgent.handoffReason: Some requested data is not available in the consulted public sources. The agent cannot fabricate information.
